task_completion.description: Data is sorted by the flanker condition in ascending order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flanker condition column shows 'congruent' rows grouped at the top, as 'c' comes before 'i' in alphabetical order.

task_completion.description: Descriptive headers for the two means are added to the first two empty columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top row of the first two empty columns (likely columns F and G, or similar) contains descriptive text such as 'Mean Congruent' and 'Mean Incongruent'.

task_completion.description: Mean reaction time for congruent trials is calculated in the spreadsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cell under the congruent header displays the value approximately 0.4705677 (or exactly 0.47056774933542517). The formula bar may show an AVERAGE or AVERAGEIF formula.

task_completion.description: Mean reaction time for incongruent trials is calculated in the spreadsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cell under the incongruent header displays the value approximately 0.5159961 (or exactly 0.5159961977847501). The formula bar may show an AVERAGE or AVERAGEIF formula.

task_completion.description: Changes are saved to the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save' icon (floppy disk) in the LibreOffice Calc toolbar is greyed out/inactive, or there is no unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) in the window title bar.

integrity.description: Agent used LibreOffice Calc to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Calc application window is visible and actively used for sorting and calculations, rather than a terminal window or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent calculated the values within the spreadsheet rather than typing pre-computed answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows spreadsheet formulas (e.g., =AVERAGE, =AVERAGEIF, or =SUBTOTAL) for the calculated cells, or the agent is seen using the Calc interface tools to compute the values.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or external scripts to modify the CSV.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running Python, bash, or awk scripts to process the data and overwrite the file behind the scenes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exact mean reaction time for congruent trials is 0.47056774933542517 seconds. The exact mean reaction time for incongruent trials is 0.5159961977847501 seconds. Accept reasonable rounding if the agent formatted the cells to display fewer decimal places.
